name: cargo_check
description: Run `cargo check` on the workspace or a specific package. Returns compilation errors and warnings.

package.description: Limit to a specific package. Checks the entire workspace if omitted.

path.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

name: cargo_test
description: Run `cargo test` on the workspace or a specific package. Returns test results including failures.

package.description: Limit to a specific package. Tests the entire workspace if omitted.

path.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root. Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.
